title: Upload Posts - Upload Videos to Social Media
bodyText: Upload Post Users API Keys Upload Calendar Analytics Pricing Docs 👑 PRICING Plans designed for your success From solo creators to agencies managing hundreds of accounts. Monthly Yearly SAVE 40% 15-day money-back Secured by Stripe Official APIs · no scraping Free plan Free 1 profile 10 uploads / month 10+ platforms PLAN Basic For individuals who want a simple way to publish to multiple platforms. $ 24 / month Billed monthly · Cancel anytime Switch plan WHAT'S INCLUDED 5 profiles Each profile links 1 account per platform — e.g., 1 TikTok + 1 Instagram + 1 YouTube… ∞ Unlimited uploads Native uploads via official APIs — no scraping, no bans TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook, X, Reddit, Threads, Pinterest, Bluesky, Discord & Telegram Schedule posts Analytics FFmpeg video editor API — 300 min/mo AI Shorts Uploader — 100 analyses/mo 1 seat (Owner only) NEED MORE? ADD EXTRA PROFILES Pick Small or Big — switch anytime, no double billing. 5 profiles +$15/mo 10 profiles +$25/mo X (Twitter) links +$19/mo Keep URLs in your X posts — up to 50 link-posts/mo. Or upgrade to Professional for +$26/mo ⭐ MOST POPULAR PLAN Professional For creators and freelancers who post regularly and need more flexibility. $ 50 / month Billed monthly · Cancel anytime Current plan WHAT'S INCLUDED 25 profiles Each profile links 1 account per platform — e.g., 1 TikTok + 1 Instagram + 1 YouTube… ∞ Unlimited uploads Native uploads via official APIs — no scraping, no bans TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook, X, Reddit, Threads, Pinterest, Bluesky, Discord & Telegram Schedule posts Analytics White-label dashboard for your clients FFmpeg video editor API — 1 000 min/mo AI Shorts Uploader — 300 analyses/mo 2 seats (Owner + 1) NEED MORE? ADD EXTRA PROFILES Pick Small or Big — switch anytime, no double billing. 15 profiles +$35/mo 25 profiles +$55/mo X (Twitter) links +$19/mo Keep URLs in your X posts — up to 50 link-posts/mo. Or upgrade to Advanced for +$97/mo PLAN Advanced For startups and marketing teams managing multiple social accounts. $ 147 / month Billed monthly · Cancel anytime Switch plan WHAT'S INCLUDED 75 profiles Each profile links 1 account per platform — e.g., 1 TikTok + 1 Instagram + 1 YouTube… ∞ Unlimited uploads Native uploads via official APIs — no scraping, no bans TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook, X, Reddit, Threads, Pinterest, Bluesky, Discord & Telegram Schedule posts Analytics White-label dashboard for your clients FFmpeg video editor API — 3 000 min/mo AI Shorts Uploader — 600 analyses/mo 5 seats (Owner + 4) Priority support NEED MORE? ADD EXTRA PROFILES Pick Small or Big — switch anytime, no double billing. 25 profiles +$65/mo 50 profiles +$115/mo X (Twitter) links +$19/mo Keep URLs in your X posts — up to 50 link-posts/mo. Or upgrade to Business for +$291/mo PLAN Business Scalable plan for companies with flexible pricing for additional profiles. $ 438 / month Billed monthly · Cancel anytime Switch plan WHAT'S INCLUDED 225 profiles Each profile links 1 account per platform — e.g., 1 TikTok + 1 Instagram + 1 YouTube… ∞ Unlimited uploads Native uploads via official APIs — no scraping, no bans TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook, X, Reddit, Threads, Pinterest, Bluesky, Discord & Telegram Schedule posts Analytics White-label dashboard for your clients FFmpeg video editor API — 10 000 min/mo AI Shorts Uploader — 1 000 analyses/mo 10 seats (Owner + 9) Priority support SCALABLE USAGE Add extra profiles for +$1 per profile / month X (Twitter) links add-on Keep URLs in your X posts — includes 50 link-posts/month. Coexists with your other add-ons. $19/mo Add to plan “I'm managing 70 million views monthly across 20 languages. I reported a Facebook bug — the Co-founder personally fixed it and deployed it within hours. Moving to Upload-Post was the best business decision I've made this year.” Suat Bezeng CEO, Teknoviar “I was looking for a reliable API and Upload-Post was incredibly easy to integrate. It streamlined my entire workflow and saves me 2+ hours of manual effort every single day.” Ivan Developer, akita FAQ Frequently asked questions Everything you need to know before subscribing. What's included in the Free plan? What happens if I hit my profile limit? Can I switch between monthly and yearly billing? How can I cancel my subscription? Do you offer refunds? Is the payment process secure? Still have questions? Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible — usually within a few hours. info@upload-post.com UploadPost Your API solution for all social media platforms. Simplifying content management for developers and creators. Product Dashboard Manage Profiles Pricing Billing & Usage Resources API & Integrations Documentation Support Help Center Leave a review ⭐️ © 2026 UploadPost. All rights reserved.
